title: CONNECTING COMMUNITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND CONNECTING COMMUNITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services for individuals with disabilities who have language and/or literacy barriers. Offers workshops for job application completion, mock interviews, resume building, ESL classes, and computer classes, and helps to find and retain employment. 237 NE Broadway Street Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: ESL and Computer Literacy Classes: Unrestricted Employment Program: -18 years of age and older -Documented disability -Able to work legally in United States -For individuals who have a language barrier or speak English as a second language Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (502) 222-8500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (502) 222-8500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an orientation FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Computer Literacy Training Programs English as a Second Language Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - EASTERSEALS OREGON EMPLOYMENT - HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - OREGON SUMMER DAY CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RESIDENTIAL SUMMER CAMP AT EVANS CREEK RETREAT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND
